items.name_en: Burberry's latest runway shoulder bag💕 crafted from selected soft leather. The front flap features a brand embossed logo, inspired by the collar shape of the classic Trench coat, making its debut at Burberry's 2022 Fall/Winter Women's Collection. 24 x 5.5 x 17.5cm

items.name_en: Burberry【Model 6641】Small Exquisite 'Title - Tiler' Handbag, crafted from vintage tartan fabric, accented with smooth leather trim and exquisite three-button rivets. Can be carried by the top handle or worn on the shoulder with a detachable strap. Size: 26 x 13.5 x 20cm

items.name_en: Burgundy 25B New 🆕 Accordion Bag 🚩🚩🚩 Sparkling Rhinestones 🎖️🎖️🎖️ Mimi Accordion Bag CHANEL Rhinestone Handle Accordion Bag 🎹 Dual-tone crystal handle is truly stunning! Retro and gorgeous, exquisite like a piece of art. The double-layer accordion style has a large capacity and can hold 2 phones 📱, a very practical bag 😄. The double C buckle design is also special, giving a blingbling feeling, so exquisite and lovely~ The goat leather is very unique! Feels very durable! It can make you look refined with any outfit. 4831 Dimensions: 11*18.5*6cm/

items.name_en: Burgundy patent leather quilted _CASSANDRE chain bag. A super practical small bag, Italian imported original top-grain cowhide, full leather interior and exterior. Exquisite craftsmanship with a square quilted pattern, classic metal logo adds personality, and a flap design ensures security. Removable shoulder strap. The bag features ten card slots, a bill compartment, two pockets, and a zippered interior pocket to hold everything!
items.name_cn:
Burgundy patent leather quilted _CASSANDRE chain bag. A super practical small bag, Italian imported original top-grain cowhide, full leather interior and exterior. Exquisite craftsmanship with a square quilted pattern, classic metal logo adds personality, and a flap design ensures security. Removable shoulder strap. The bag features ten card slots, a bill compartment, two pockets, and a zippered interior pocket to hold everything!
Model: 743364
Size: 23x14x3cm
Strap Length: 47cm

items.name_en: Burgundy·
items.name_cn:
Burgundy·
LE 37_Mini Bucket Bag
The bucket bag that took the fashion world by storm upon its debut!
Smooth calfskin body with a simple, structured silhouette; it looks structured without being too sharp.
Paired with the brand's signature logo new insert buckle, it exudes a unique charm that is both classic and elegant, yet very modern and stylish.
Model: 765870
Size: 15x13x6cm

items.name_en: Burgundy🔮🔮🔮🚩🚩🚩Calfskin CHANEL 26C Hobo Bag, writing a new definition of elegance with a casual attitude! The perfect blend of soft calfskin and metal chains interprets an effortless sense of luxury. In fashion rules, the word "wanderer" has never been so elegant. The Hobo Bag, with its unique lazy silhouette and exquisite craftsmanship, redefines the perfect balance between casualness and luxury. Design Highlights: Unconventional elegance, crafted from premium soft leather, presenting a lazy yet structured silhouette. The double chain ⛓️ closure design is the iconic element of this bag; the metal and leather intertwined strap is not only beautiful but also provides a comfortable wearing experience. The spacious interior breaks the stereotype of niche bags being impractical. Whether it's daily essentials or small items, it can be easily stored. Style Matching: The perfect companion from casual to formal 👨‍❤️‍💋‍👨, adding points to the overall look. When paired with a dress or a little black dress, it adds a touch of elegance and sophistication to the overall look. A conquering item in the fashion world, this bag has become the first choice for many stars and fashion icons. From Zhou Xun, Liu Wen to Chen Weiting, whether male or female, everyone can carry their own style, proving the charm of this design transcends gender boundaries. Dimensions: Length 35CM, Width 14CM, Height 45cm

items.name_en: BV 2024 Fall/Winter New Arrival: Super Unique Wax Leather Tote. Made from soft calfskin, it feels soft and warm. The simple colors are very attractive, and the capacity is amazing; a laptop fits easily. It is unisex, truly a must-have. Cool, chic, and premium. Let it become your most intimate bag this autumn.

items.name_en: BV 2024 New Rumple Leather Detail
items.name_cn:
BV 2024 New Rumple Leather Detail
The inverted triangle metal buckle is stylish and unisex. BV woven bag # seamless body
A treasure bag, the entire handbag is made from a single piece of leather, requiring 20M wadding tubular strips. The body shows no seams, showcasing exquisite craftsmanship. The crepe technique calf leather feels amazing, like a squishy BV bag.
High-craftsmanship Rumple Messenger, newly arrived. Adjustable length, shoulder or crossbody is fine. You deserve it!
Style: 776519
Size: 30*23*7.5cm (Strap length 55cm)
